item.title: Shellcode
item.description: #include <stdio.h>int main(int argc, int argv[]){ printf("hello world\n"); system("/bin/bash"); if(pass == 0xdeadbeef){ printf("goodbye elf\n"); } else{ system("exit"); } return 0; } this is a simple c code to test working of the blog synstac

item.title: About
item.description: I`m an independent security researcher located in kenya interested in low-level stuff such as reverse engineering, malware analysis, exploit development and embedded security.This is a blog about my research and learning documentation. You can reach me through Twitter Github
